Your first responsibility is to freeze provenance and define a beginner-readable timeline before fear-based interpretations harden into public fact. caseFile.objective: Resolve Dead Channel Protocol and identify the operator behind predictive panic campaigns and recover source orchestration logs.
caseFile.primaryQuestion: Who controls the active manipulation path in substation relay mesh, and what truth are they preventing from becoming durable record?
caseFile.operationWindow: 72-hour stabilization, then progressive escalation toward final branch lock.
successCriteria: Clear chronology that can be understood and repeated by first-time players.
Witness testimony that remains coherent under adversarial reinterpretation.
Evidence provenance recorded before narrative interpretation.
Final branch chosen with explicit ethical and operational rationale.
Keep villain advantage below critical takeover threshold.
Preserve witness testimony through final debrief.
Maintain admissible chain-of-custody on primary evidence.
failureConsequences: Root Administrator gains control of the narrative around Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes.
At least one witness or ally is killed, abducted, or mentally broken.
Core ghost-app prediction feed evidence is destroyed or rendered inadmissible.
Public trust collapses and the investigation is politically buried.
Mission failure forces a full restart from Day 1.
